calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights Under Ccp Section 708.510(A), Restraining Order Under Ccp Section 708.520(A), And Turnover Order Under Ccp Section 699.040, Pursuant To Ccp Section 1710.45(B)(2), And That All Assets Levied Upon Shall Be Impounded Pending Service Of The Notice Of Entry Of The Sister State Judgment And Application Thereon, Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 1710.30(A) [Assignment Motion]
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Cook, esq. (415-989-4730) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs ROBBIE GILLELAND and REBECCA GILLELAND's Motion For Assignment Of Rights Under Ccp Section 708.510(A), Restraining Order Under Ccp Section 708.520(A), And Turnover Order Under Ccp Section 699.040, Pursuant To Ccp Section 1710.45(B)(2), And That All Assets Levied Upon Shall Be Impounded Pending Service Of The Notice Of Entry Of The Sister State Judgment And Application Thereon, Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 1710.30(A) [Assignment Motion]

Granted. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
